name: EdwBhiMbrEnrDsLd

sqlReaderQuery.value: SELECT BHI_HOME_PLN_ID, HOME_PLN_PROD_ID, MBR_ID, CONSIS_MBR_ID, TRACEABILITY_FLD, MBR_DOB, MBR_CUR_PRI_ZIP_CD, MBR_S_CUR_CTRY, MBR_S_CUR_CNTY, MBR_GNDR, MBR_CONFITY_CD, ACCT, GRP_ID, SUBGRP_ID, COV_BEG_DT, COV_END_DT, MBR_RELSHP, HOME_PLN_PROD_ID_SUB, SUB_ID, ENR_ELIG_STTUS, MBR_MED_COB_CD, MBR_PDX_COB_CD, DEDCT_CAT, MHCD_ENR_BNF, PDX_BNF_IN, MHCD_BNF_IN, MED_BNF_IN, HOSP_BNF_IN, BHI_NTWK_CAT_FCLTY, BHI_NTWK_CAT_PROF, PLN_NTWK_CAT_FCLTY, PLN_NTWK_CAT_PROF, PDX_CARVE_OUT_SUBMSN_IN, PDX_BNF_TIERS, MBR_UNIQ_KEY, MBR_EFF_DT_SK, MBR_TERM_DT_SK, PROD_SK, PROD_SH_NM FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.W_BHI_MBR_ENR

text.value: WITH cte_base AS ( SELECT * FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_edw_staging}.MbrEnr_TMP_EdwBhiMbrEnrDsLd ), cte_member_hist AS ( SELECT BHI_HOME_PLN_ID, HOME_PLN_PROD_ID, MBR_ID, CONSIS_MBR_ID, TRACEABILITY_FLD, MBR_DOB, MBR_CUR_PRI_ZIP_CD, MBR_S_CUR_CTRY, MBR_S_CUR_CNTY, MBR_GNDR, MBR_CONFITY_CD AS MBR_CONF_CD, ACCT, GRP_ID, SUBGRP_ID, COV_BEG_DT, COV_END_DT, MBR_RELSHP, HOME_PLN_PROD_ID_SUB, SUB_ID, ENR_ELIG_STTUS, MBR_MED_COB_CD, MBR_PDX_COB_CD, DEDCT_CAT, MHCD_ENR_BNF, PDX_BNF_IN, MHCD_BNF_IN, MED_BNF_IN, HOSP_BNF_IN, BHI_NTWK_CAT_FCLTY, BHI_NTWK_CAT_PROF, PLN_NTWK_CAT_FCLTY, PLN_NTWK_CAT_PROF, PDX_CARVE_OUT_SUBMSN_IN, PDX_BNF_TIERS, MBR_UNIQ_KEY, MBR_EFF_DT_SK, MBR_TERM_DT_SK, PROD_SK, PROD_SH_NM FROM cte_base ), cte_load AS ( SELECT dbo.trim_default(MBR_ID) AS MBR_UNIQ_KEY, dbo.trim_default(HOME_PLN_PROD_ID) AS PROD_ID FROM cte_base ), cte_dedp_load AS ( SELECT MBR_UNIQ_KEY, PROD_ID FROM ( SELECT MBR_UNIQ_KEY, PROD_ID, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY MBR_UNIQ_KEY, PROD_ID ORDER BY (SELECT 1)) AS rn FROM cte_load ) t WHERE t.rn = 1 ) DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_edw_staging}.Member_Hist_Enr_TMP_EdwBhiMbrEnrDsLd SELECT BHI_HOME_PLN_ID, HOME_PLN_PROD_ID, MBR_ID, CONSIS_MBR_ID, TRACEABILITY_FLD, MBR_DOB, MBR_CUR_PRI_ZIP_CD, MBR_S_CUR_CTRY, MBR_S_CUR_CNTY, MBR_GNDR, MBR_CONF_CD, ACCT, GRP_ID, SUBGRP_ID, COV_BEG_DT, COV_END_DT, MBR_RELSHP, HOME_PLN_PROD_ID_SUB, SUB_ID, ENR_ELIG_STTUS, MBR_MED_COB_CD, MBR_PDX_COB_CD, DEDCT_CAT, MHCD_ENR_BNF, PDX_BNF_IN, MHCD_BNF_IN, MED_BNF_IN, HOSP_BNF_IN, BHI_NTWK_CAT_FCLTY, BHI_NTWK_CAT_PROF, PLN_NTWK_CAT_FCLTY, PLN_NTWK_CAT_PROF, PDX_CARVE_OUT_SUBMSN_IN, PDX_BNF_TIERS, MBR_UNIQ_KEY, MBR_EFF_DT_SK, MBR_TERM_DT_SK, PROD_SK, PROD_SH_NM INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_edw_staging}.Member_Hist_Enr_TMP_EdwBhiMbrEnrDsLd FROM cte_member_hist DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_edw_staging}.WBHI_MBR_ENR_TMP_EdwBhiMbrEnrDsLd SELECT MBR_UNIQ_KEY, PROD_ID INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_edw_staging}.WBHI_MBR_ENR_TMP_EdwBhiMbrEnrDsLd FROM cte_dedp_load
